Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Interface Maybe<T>

All Superinterfaces:
Collection<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Maybe.Nothing, Maybe.Some
public interface Maybe<T> extends Collection<T>

    • fromMaybe

      @Deprecated default T fromMaybe(T def)
      Deprecated.
      Use orElse(Object) instead.

    • orElse

      default T orElse(T def)
      Returns the contained value if present, otherwise returns the provided default.
      Parameters:
      def - The fallback value.
      Returns:
      The value or def.

    • orElseGet

      default T orElseGet(Supplier<? extends T> supplier)
      Returns the contained value if present, otherwise returns the result of the supplier.
      Parameters:
      supplier - The supplier of the fallback value.
      Returns:
      The value or supplier result.

    • orElseThrow

      default <X extends Throwable> T orElseThrow(Supplier<? extends X> exceptionSupplier) throws X
      Returns the contained value if present, otherwise throws the exception from the supplier.
      Type Parameters:
      X - Type of the exception.
      Parameters:
      exceptionSupplier - The supplier of the exception.
      Returns:
      The value.
      Throws:
      X - if no value is present.

    • map

      default <R> Maybe<R> map(Function<T,R> fn)
      Description copied from interface: Collection
      Transforms each element of the collection using the provided function.
      Specified by:
      map in interface Collection<T>
      Type Parameters:
      R - The type of elements in the resulting collection.
      Parameters:
      fn - The transformation function.
      Returns:
      A new collection containing the transformed elements.

    • filter

      default Maybe<T> filter(Predicate<T> pred)
      Description copied from interface: Collection
      Returns a new collection containing only elements that satisfy the predicate.
      Specified by:
      filter in interface Collection<T>
      Parameters:
      pred - The condition to test against.
      Returns:
      A filtered collection.
